ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
Language: rust
Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentgateway/agentgateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentgateway/agentgateway
Language: rust
Next Generation Agentic Proxy for AI Agents and MCP servers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cjpais/Handy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cjpais/Handy
Language: rust
A free, open source, and extensible speech-to-text application that works completely offline.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datadog-labs/pup
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datadog-labs/pup
Language: rust
Give your AI agent a Pup — a CLI companion with 200+ commands across 33+ Datadog products.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iii-hq/iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iii-hq/iii
Language: rust
iii unifies your existing backend stack with a single engine and three primitives: Function, Trigger, and Worker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ilysenko/codex-desktop-linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ilysenko/codex-desktop-linux
Language: rust
Run OpenAI Codex Desktop on Linux - automated installer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memvid/memvid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memvid/memvid
Language: rust
Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: njbrake/agent-of-empires
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/njbrake/agent-of-empires
Language: rust
Manage multiple Claude Code, OpenCode agents from either TUI or Web for easy access on mobile. Also supports Mistral Vibe, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi.dev, Copilot CLI, Factory Droid Coding. Uses tmux and git worktrees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oxc-project/oxc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc
Language: rust
⚓ A collection of high-performance JavaScript tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: quickwit-oss/tantivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/quickwit-oss/tantivy
Language: rust
Tantivy is a full-text search engine library inspired by Apache Lucene and written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qxcnm/Codex-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qxcnm/Codex-Manager
Language: rust
一个Codex cli 账号管理与切换工具。为 Codex cli提供本地网关转发。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: risingwavelabs/risingwave
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/risingwavelabs/risingwave
Language: rust
Event streaming platform for agentic AI. Continuously ingest, transform, and serve event streams in real time, at scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tokio-rs/tokio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tokio-rs/tokio
Language: rust
A runtime for writing reliable asynchronous applications with Rust. Provides I/O, networking, scheduling, timers, ...

ns0:entry.ns0:title: warpdotdev/warp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/warpdotdev/warp
Language: rust
Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.
